# INLocationSearchType.unknown

**Case**

An unknown search type.

## Declaration

```swift
case unknown
```

## Discussion

When specified, don’t consider location values as part of your search criteria.

## Constants

- **INLocationSearchType.byLocationTrigger**: A search type that requires matching the trigger location of a reminder to the specified location.

items.description: A search type that requires matching the trigger location of a reminder to the specified location.
